method.description: Indicate through which method you want to receive data with the callback, by default it is POST

field.description: Name of the field containing the callback return data

url.description: Url where the callback call will be made

data.description: Object to be completed at your convenience with additional data that you can use back with the callback

spedizione.description: type of shipment, by default it is ordinary

soggetto_emittente.description: subject who issued the identity document

title.description: You can provide a title and a description to your request. It will be shown in the iframe to the users during the signing process

content.description: base64 encoding of your PDF file

phone.description: Always specify the international prefix, starting with a '+' sign. If the '+' is omitted, the Italian (+39) prefix will be prepended

signs.description: Where the signs of this member will be placed. You can specify more than one place with an array of pages and positions.

page.description: Page number where the sign will be placed. Please note that the pagination starts from 1, and not 0.

position.description: Coordinates in px of the bounding box where the sign will be placed in, on the current page

FesCreateUi.description:
The following options can be specified:
  • enableHeaderBar can display or not the header bar of the iFrame. The default value is true.
  • enableHeaderBarSignAs can display or not the bar just below the header bar to mention the name of the signer. The default value is true.
  • enableSidebar can display or not the sidebar, where you can find documents and signers just on the left of the document viewer. The default value is true.
  • enableMemberList is located in the sidebar. You can display or not the members list (signers or validators of the procedure). The default value is true.
  • enableDocumentList is located in the sidebar. You can display or not documents list. The default value is true.
  • enableDocumentDownload is located in the document list. You can authorize or not to download document by your users. The default value is true.
  • enableActivities is located in the sidebar. You can access to activities feed that display who sign, validate or comment the procedure. The default value is true.
  • authenticationPopup For signing, a user will be redirected to a view which will request a security b. You can change it just by a popup on the document's viewer by turning this field to true. The default value is false.
  • enableRefuseComment can display or not the popup which contains the comment asked when the participant refuse the procedure. The default value is true.

logo.description: A base-64 encoded image, prefixed with the data URI scheme

labels.description: Customize the content of certain elements in the iFrame by overriding the content of some labels. Each available language should have its own translated string, or the default label will be shown.

redirectSuccess.description: You can customise the experience after the signature, the cancel or an error during the process. Use redirectSuccess to redirect a user to an url when he have been signed.Specify the url field and the way to open it in the target field, like an HTML link.The auto boolean can be useful if you don't want to redirect just after the signature. If you want to display a button in the iframe with the following text : 'You have sucessfully signed, click here to continue.', pass it to false. By default, at true, the redirect will be automaticly fired when the event is fired too.You can customise 2 others redirects : redirectCancel when the member decline your procedure and redirectError if we encounter an error during the signature process.

phone.description: Always specify the international prefix, starting with a '+' sign. If the '+' is omitted, the Italian (+39) prefix will be prepended

signs.description: Where the signs of this member will be placed. You can specify more than one place with an array of pages and positions.

page.description: Page number where the sign will be placed. Please note that the pagination starts from 1, and not 0.

position.description: Coordinates in px where the sign will be placed on the current page

FesStatus.description: The request will return one of the following statuses.

field.description: Name of the field containing the callback return data

url.description: Url where the callback call will be made

headers.description: A key-value object containing additional headers for the callback. This field can be used to include custom authentication logic if needed.

200.description:
- OK
- Schemi di riferimento all'intero di *data* per categoria:
  - ResponseFirmaEstero: FIREST
  - ResponseLettore: FIR_V or LETTORE or KEY_V or FIRREM_V or KEYCNS_V or SMARTCARDCNS_V
  - ResponseRinnovi: RINFIR or RINCNS or RINFIRREM 
  - ResponseFirma: KEY or FIR or KIT or FIRREM or KEYCNS or SMARTCARDCNS or KITCNS
  - ResponseFirmeAruba: SCARUBACNS or ARUBAKEYCNS or OTPDIS or OTPMOB or VIDEORIC
  - ResponseFirmeVideoriconoscimento: SMARTCARDCNS_VIDEO or KEYCNS_VIDEO or FIRREM_VIDEO

/SMARTCARDCNS_VIDEO /KEYCNS_VIDEO /FIRRE.description: The same exemple for SMARTCARDCNS_VIDEO or KEYCNS_VIDEO or FIRREM_VIDEO

get.summary: Retrieve Audit Trail for Signed Document
get.description:
Retrieve the audit trail for the specified electronic signature.

### Parameters
- **id** (path parameter): The unique identifier of the signed document.

### Example
```bash
# Download audit trail in JSON format
curl -X GET https://ws.firmadigitale.com/firma_elettronica/923j90n02n1w51504b6ea145/audit


The response will contain the audit trail information for the electronic signature.

firstname.description: First name of the individual initiating the electronic signature.

lastname.description: Last name of the individual initiating the electronic signature.

email.description: Email address of the individual initiating the electronic signature.

phone.description: Phone number of the individual initiating the electronic signature.

status.description: Status of the electronic signature procedure.

position.description: Position of the individual in the signing order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the electronic signature request was initiated.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the electronic signature request was last updated.

sign_link.description: Link for the individual to access and sign the electronic document.

id.description: Unique identifier for the electronically signed file.

name.description: Name of the electronically signed document.

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the electronically signed document.

reason.description: Reason for the revision of the electronically signed document.

timestamp.description: Indicates whether the revision has a timestamp.

dn.description: Distinguished Name in the electronic signature certificate.

content.description: Content of the electronic signature certificate.

country.description: Country in the electronic signature certificate.

lastname.description: Last name in the electronic signature certificate.

firstname.description: First name in the electronic signature certificate.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the electronic signature certificate was generated.

reason_source.description: Source of the reason for the revision in the electronic signature.

contentType.description: Content type of the electronically signed document.

items.description: Consent processes related to the electronically signed document.

id.description: Unique identifier for the member involved in the electronic signature.

ip.description: IP address of the member involved in the electronic signature.

email.description: Email address of the member involved in the electronic signature.

phone.description: Phone number of the member involved in the electronic signature.

lastname.description: Last name of the member involved in the electronic signature.

signedAt.description: Timestamp when the member signed the electronic document.

firstname.description: First name of the member involved in the electronic signature.

operationLevel.description: Operation level of the member in the electronic signature (custom in this case).

mode.description: Authentication mode used by the member (sms in this case).

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the authentication details.

channel.description: Communication channel used for authentication (text in this case).

validatedAt.description: Timestamp when the authentication was validated.

id.description: Unique identifier for the electronic signature procedure.

name.description: Name of the electronic signature procedure.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the electronic signature procedure was created.

expiredAt.description: Timestamp when the electronic signature procedure expired (null if not expired).

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the electronic signature procedure started.

id.description: Unique identifier for the workspace associated with the procedure.

name.description: Name of the workspace associated with the procedure.

description.description: Description of the electronic signature procedure.

id.description: Unique identifier for the organization associated with the procedure.

ip.description: IP address of the organization associated with the procedure.

name.description: Name of the organization associated with the procedure.

coolingOffPeriodEndsAt.description: Timestamp when the cooling-off period ends (null if not applicable).

items.description: Consent processes related to the electronic signature procedure.

success.description: Indicates whether the electronic signature operation was successful.

message.description: A message related to the electronic signature operation.

error.description: Error details related to the electronic signature operation.
